GeneralDescription.SourceString: You don't want to be on her list.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: You don't want to be on her list.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: When there's someone who needs finding, Saskia's the one to call. Her talents in tracking and secret-uncovering have made her the best of the best. The question is, who is she searching for now?
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: When there's someone who needs finding, Saskia's the one to call. Her talents in tracking and secret-uncovering have made her the best of the best. The question is, who is she searching for now?
